ops.title: mountd holder-spawn tests flaky: 'holder socket never came up' (TestRemoteHostConvergeSkewReplacesAndRemountsAll in CI -race, TestRemoteHostConvergeSkipsMuxSubtrees locally, both 2026-07-08)

ops.text: root cause identified (spawn timing vs RLIMIT/proc pressure) and the converge tests pass 20x under -race -count=20 in CI
